nodes.label: Production Profile Configuration
nodes.rationale: All connection parameters externalized via environment variables. Swagger UI disabled. Cookie secure flag enabled for HTTPS. Larger connection pools (50 max) and Redis pools (32 active). Actuator health endpoints exposed with probes enabled but details hidden. Flyway clean disabled to prevent accidental data loss.

nodes.label: Production Actuator Health Configuration
nodes.rationale: Exposes health and info actuator endpoints only, with details hidden and Kubernetes-style liveness/readiness probes enabled. DB and Redis health auto-configured; MinIO health requires a custom HealthIndicator bean.
